Package io.github.lunasaw.sip.common.transmit.request

Class SipRequestBuilderFactory

java.lang.Object
io.github.lunasaw.sip.common.transmit.request.SipRequestBuilderFactory
public class SipRequestBuilderFactory extends Object
SIP请求构建器工厂类 提供统一的构建器获取接口和便捷的构建方法
Author:
luna
